user.title: Choose heating entities
user.description: Select the thermostat and entities used to plan home heating.

settings.title: Configure heating
settings.description: Choose the temperatures and warm-up limits used by the controller.

abort.already_configured: This thermostat is already controlled by another Central Heating Controller entry.

error.entity_not_found: The selected entity does not exist.
error.target_temperature_unsupported: The thermostat does not support setting a target temperature.
error.invalid_climate: The thermostat does not provide usable modes or temperature limits.
error.no_active_hvac_modes: The thermostat has no active HVAC mode.
error.unsupported_hvac_mode: Select an active HVAC mode supported by the thermostat.
error.temperature_out_of_range: The temperature must be within the thermostat's supported range.
error.temperature_step: The temperature must match the thermostat's supported step.
error.temperature_order: High temperature must be at least low temperature, and low temperature must be at least eco temperature.
error.invalid_duration: Enter a duration from 5 to 360 minutes in 5-minute increments.
error.warmup_order: Fallback warm-up duration cannot exceed maximum warm-up duration.
error.already_configured: This thermostat is already controlled by another Central Heating Controller entry.

init.title: Update heating entities
init.description: Change the thermostat and entities used to plan home heating.

settings.title: Update heating settings
settings.description: Change control settings or request a one-time learning reset.
